character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: A boy involved in a treasure hunt, interacting with a marooned sailor.

character_dossiers.name: Benjamin Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: A marooned sailor who has been on the island for three years, possessing a boat and knowledge of the island's secrets.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: A gentleman associated with the treasure hunt, referenced in dialogue.

character_dossiers.name: the cap'n
character_dossiers.biography: A ship captain who was displeased with his crew's decision to land on the island.

character_dossiers.name: Billy Bones
character_dossiers.biography: A mate on Flint's ship, referenced in the story of the treasure burial.

character_dossiers.name: Long John
character_dossiers.biography: A quartermaster on Flint's ship, referenced in the story of the treasure burial.
